createForm.nameHelp: For example Master CV or Backend developer 2026.
createForm.fullNameHelp: Shown at the top of your CV. You can change it later.

rename.title: Rename CV
rename.description: The name appears in your CV list and in tailored versions.

delete.title: Delete CV?
delete.description: You are about to permanently delete <name>{name}</name>, including any saved original file. This cannot be undone.

upload.pendingText: Uploading and reviewing your CV. This may take a moment.
upload.nameHint: The name appears at the top of your CV. We suggest your account name.
upload.help: Upload a PDF or Word file (DOCX) of at most 10 MB. We read the contents and create a CV you can review and edit.
upload.errorWrongType: Choose a PDF or Word file (DOCX).
upload.errorTooLarge: The file is too large. The maximum size is 10 MB.
upload.errorGeneric: Something went wrong during the import. Try again in a moment.
upload.errorRateLimited: Too many uploads. Wait {seconds} seconds and try again.

consent.title: The file contains a personal identity number
consent.finding: We found {count, plural, one {a personal identity number} other {# personal identity numbers}} in the file you uploaded. A personal identity number does not need to be in a CV and should be removed before you use the contents.
consent.storeExplainer: Do you want to save the original file anyway? It is stored encrypted and only you can open it. Saving the file does not make it your CV. To use the contents you first need to remove the personal identity number from the file and upload it again.
consent.privacyLink: How we handle personal identity numbers

parse.title: How your CV was read
parse.overallConfident: We were able to read your CV and split it into clear sections. Please review that everything is correct.
parse.overallDegraded: We were able to read your CV, but some sections came out incomplete. You can fill them in during the next step.
parse.overallFailed: We could not read any usable text from the file. You can fill in the details by hand instead.
parse.manualReviewNote: Some sections need to be filled in before your CV is ready. You do that in the next step.

review.title: Review
review.unavailable: The review could not be loaded right now. How your CV was read above is not affected. Try reloading the page in a moment.
review.summary: {assessedCount} of {totalCount} criteria are assessed. Criteria that cannot be assessed are honestly counted as not assessed and never lower the review.

status.groupLabel: What do you want to do with this finding
status.resolvedHint: You have marked this as fixed. It stays in the review until the finding is gone from your CV.
status.ignoredHint: You have chosen to ignore this style rule. It no longer counts as something to fix.
status.staleHint: You marked this as fixed, but the finding is still present in your CV. Reset it if you want to fix it again.

improve.title: Improvement suggestions
improve.unavailable: The suggestions could not be loaded right now. How your CV was read and the review are not affected. Try reloading the page in a moment.
improve.empty: No improvement suggestions for this profile. The review shows what has already been assessed.

occupations.title: Possible occupational areas
occupations.lede: Suggested occupational areas based on your CV. You confirm your occupation in a later step.

preview.title: CV preview
preview.rateLimited: You have made too many requests in a short time. Try again in {seconds} seconds.
preview.notFound: The preview could not be found. Go back to the review and try again.
preview.error: The preview could not be loaded. Try again in a moment or go back to the review.
preview.atsTextBanner: This is how an ATS parser reads your CV: one column, top to bottom, plain text. Your pdf looks different to people.
preview.atsTextNotFound: The text version is not available yet.
preview.atsTextError: Could not fetch the text version. Try again in a moment.

match.nudgeTitle: Do you want to update your matching based on this CV?
match.nudgeText: We can suggest occupations based on your CV. You choose what is included, and you can skip it.

personnummer.regionLabel: Personal identity number found in your CV
personnummer.title: Remove personal identity number
personnummer.body: We found {count, plural, one {# occurrence} other {# occurrences}} of what looks like a personal identity number. A personal identity number is not needed in a CV. Remove it before you save.

contentForm.summaryHint: A short summary of your profile.

gapfillForm.nameHint: An internal name so you can find the right CV variant.
gapfillForm.summaryHint: A short summary of your profile.

guide.closeConfirmBody: The changes you made here will not be saved. Your imported CV stays on the CV page.
guide.railStatusRemaining: {count, plural, one {# task left} other {# tasks left}}
guide.fixFields: Some details need fixing. They are marked below.
guide.degradedNote: The parsing of this section came out incomplete. Please check that everything is correct.

details.intro: Confirm what we read from your file and fill in what is missing.
details.profileHint: A short summary of your profile.

experience.intro: Add your experience and education. You fill in the dates yourself, we never guess them.
experience.ongoingHint: The end date is hidden while the role is ongoing.
experience.sectionsIntro: Add your own sections, for example projects, certificates or references.
experience.suggestionsNoOccupation: Set your occupation under Matching in settings and we will suggest sections that are common in your field.
experience.sectionHeadingHint: Name the section, for example projects or certificates.
experience.entryHint: Fill in a title or text. At least one of the fields is needed.

save.intro: Review and save. The source file is kept untouched.
save.summaryRemaining: {count, plural, one {# task left} other {# tasks left}}
save.remainingOptional: You can save anyway. The remaining details are optional, and you can fill them in later.
save.nameHint: The name is only for you and is never shown to employers.
save.sourceUntouched: The source file is kept untouched.

actions.serverUnreachable: Could not reach the server. Try again.
actions.statusUpdateFailed: Could not update the finding status. Reload the review and try again.
